azureLogAnalytics.query:
CredentialRenewalAppOverview_CL
| where '$internalCodeFilter' == 'All' or ('$internalCodeFilter' == 'Missing internal code' and HasInternalCode_bool == false) or ('$internalCodeFilter' == 'With internal code' and HasInternalCode_bool == true)
| where isempty('$azureAppName') or AzureAppName_s contains '$azureAppName'
| where isempty('$owner') or OwnersText_s contains '$owner'
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by AzureAppObjectId_s
| project AzureAppName=AzureAppName_s, AzureAppId=AzureAppId_s, InternalCode=ServiceManagementReference_s, Status=Status_s, SecretCount=SecretCount_d, CertificateCount=CertificateCount_d, NextSecretExpiry=NextSecretExpiry_t, NextCertificateExpiry=NextCertificateExpiry_t, OwnerEmails=OwnerEmails_s, LastSeenAt=LastSeenAt_t, DeletedAt=DeletedAt_t
| order by AzureAppName asc
